channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.description: The United States has launched a third night of strikes on Iranian military targets, with President Donald Trump announcing plans to impose a blockade on Iranian ports and charge a 20% fee for cargo p...

item.title: Sudbury to Compete for 2030 Memorial Cup
item.description: Sudbury, Ontario, has officially announced its intention to host the 2030 Memorial Cup, a prestigious junior ice hockey tournament in Canada. The decision comes as part of a broader effort by Northern...

item.title: Orange Group Introduces Cannon PM for Nighttime Recovery in Nigeria

item.title: Pascal Tokodi Tributes Dennis Mugo for Paving Way in Kenyan Cinema
item.description: Dennis Mugo, known as OJ for his iconic role in Tahidi High, received heartfelt tributes from fellow actor Pascal Tokodi and fans. Tokodi praised Mugo for inspiring a generation of actors and vowed to...

item.title: Ruto shifts focus from religious appeal to infrastructure in Kenya's 2027 election
item.description: President William Ruto of Kenya is transitioning from a faith-based political strategy that helped him win the 2022 election to a focus on infrastructure projects like roads, markets, and affordable h...

item.title: Sam Neill Remembered by Co-Stars and Colleagues: Tributes to a Versatile Actor

item.title: Police Investigate Fake Government Agency PFIPC
item.description: Police in Nigeria have uncovered a scam involving a fake government agency called the Presidential Foreign Intervention Promotion Council (PFIPC). The investigation, initiated after a petition from th...

item.title: Analysis of Trump's Influence on U.S. Politics and Public Opinion

item.title: NPA Assures Case Against Matlala Remains Unaffected Despite Plea Deal Withdrawal
item.description: The National Prosecuting Authority (NPA) has confirmed that the withdrawal of Vusimuzi 'Cat' Matlala from a plea and sentence agreement in the Medicare24 contract case will not undermine the ongoing i...

item.title: Pakistan's Operation Shaban targets militants in Balochistan
item.description: In an ongoing military operation named Shaban in Balochistan, security forces have eliminated a total of 83 terrorists since July 5, according to state media. The campaign was launched in retaliation ...

item.title: Philippine Coast Guard Monitors 24 Chinese Vessels in West Philippine Sea
item.description: The Philippine Coast Guard (PCG) has tracked a total of 24 Chinese vessels operating in key areas of the West Philippine Sea from July 7 to 13, 2026. According to the latest monitoring report, this in...

item.description: An audit report has raised serious concerns about the transparency and accountability of a Rs75 billion development fund allocated under the Sustainable Development Goals Achievement Program (SAP). Th...

item.title: Makueni Family Seeks Justice After Daughter's Death Remains Unresolved
item.description: A 16-year-old Form 2 student from Matulani, Makueni county, vanished on 3 November 2025 after leaving home to buy vegetables. Her body was discovered in December near a bush close to her home, with he...

item.title: Market Participants Boost Wagers on Interest Rate Rises
